title: Specification overlay for Acceptance Test-Driven Development (G-W-T-required)
description: Overlays the baseline `spec.schema.json` with ATDD-style enforcement: acceptance[] must contain at least one Given-When-Then scenario. functional_requirements[].statement remains free-form (no EARS pattern) so behaviors can be expressed in any natural style, and each acceptance scenario should reference the relevant FR via requirement_refs. Activated when frontmatter `methodology: atdd` is declared (or via project default_methodology / skill default override).

acceptance.description: ATDD requires at least one Given-When-Then acceptance scenario. Each item should reference at least one FR/NFR via requirement_refs for traceability.
